Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scent of broiled fish fills[n]the air inside the restaurant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Ahh, where do I even start...? It's all a mess in my head.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message label. *If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}My nephew gave it to me. He said it's a good luck charm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}If you get hurt during practice, now you can tape yourself up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I wanted you to be the first to know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I've made up my mind. I'm going to have surgery to fix my knee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}I don't think there's enough time for me to recover by then. But that's okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I probably won't be able to keep it. Guess I'll owe him an explanation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I don't mean to pout or anything. I'm just trying to stop making selfish choices.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I don't think it's right for the whole team to suffer because of my knee and my nephew.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Even if I managed to win, I don't think I'd feel good about it afterward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Up until now, all I could think about was winning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But my eyes opened up after Coach grilled you about my knee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It was such an obvious thing—I realized I can't keep thinking only about myself.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Winning still means a lot to me. That's part of who I am, and that's probably not going to change. But for now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm not gonna worry about winning races. I'm gonna focus on winning back my health instead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 8 5 105}Haha, well I can't exactly force myself to heal, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 13 8 5 105}Y-You think so? In a good way, right? Like I'm more mature?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Anyway, I can't just keep asking for your help all the time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That said, thanks for everything you've done for me so far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Between practice and rehab, I'll have a lot going on. But I'm gonna kick butt at both of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}And someday, I'll kick your butt too, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto shared how[n]much he cares about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Chariot Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Thor{f 0 1 27}, the mighty god of thunder![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'm gonna go tell my nephew what happened and offer to go through rehab with him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I wonder which one of us will recover first. He's a tough one, you know. Just like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I passed the time chatting[n]away with Miyamoto.[n]{f 1 1}
